name: House of Beers API
description: Backend API for House of Beers loyalty app

dokku.postdeploy: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

SECRET_KEY.description: Django secret key for cryptographic signing

DEBUG.description: Django debug mode (set to False in production)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL (auto-set by Dokku postgres plugin)
